body.description: Speed increases by 10 feet. Dash through difficult terrain doesn't cost extra movement. After making a melee attack against a creature this turn, you don't provoke opportunity attacks from that creature.

Opportunity attack reduces the creature's speed to 0. Creatures provoke opportunity attacks even with Disengage. When a creature within 5 feet attacks a target other than you, you can use a reaction to make a melee attack.
Increase one ability score by 1 (max 20). Gain proficiency in one skill. Choose one skill you're proficient in to gain Expertise.
